ingredients_text: Light Cream (cream, milk), Water, Butter (cream natural flavorings), Parmesan and Romano Cheese (pasteurized part-skim milk, cheese cultures, salt, enzymes), Enzyme Modified Egg Yolk, Contains less than 2% of Parmesan Cheese (pasteurized milk, salt, rennet), Sea Salt, Black Pepper, White Pepper, Modified Food Starch, Disodium Phosphate, Xanthan Gum.
